checkin.journal:
Well, it was a good day. I did a hyperbaric chamber as well after the breakfast, and it was completely fine for an hour and two atmospheres. Might find something in California as well. It'll be really cool. I think I had more sitting bone pain which was kinda weird because I think it came up after I was pinching myself and testing in the morning a lot trying to find my pain, so I must have triggered something.
